empty: No enterprise policy — `{}`, the 'no settings.json present' signal.
enabled-plugins: Enables two plugins, disables one. When this is set, only the true-mapped plugins pass the gate.
extra-marketplaces: Adds two enterprise marketplaces (github + git source forms), unioned with the user's own.
strict-marketplaces: strictKnownMarketplaces=true — only the enterprise marketplace is trusted; all others are blocked.
malformed: Off-spec entries — core's adapter drops the bad ones and emits warnings.
